admission_overview.college_name: IMAS Business School Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

paragraphs: IMAS Business School admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The institute considers entrance exams such as CAT, MAT, CMAT, etc. for MBA courses. IMAS Business Schooloffers courses at the PG level in Management and Hotel Management streams. The programmes include MBA Global and PGDM courses. Interested candidates can apply online for the preferred course.

IMAS offers admission to courses based on entrance exam scores or the merit of the candidates in the qualifying exam. Aspirants have to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria to apply for admission. Below areIMAS Business School coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Candidates have to first apply for the preferred course at IMAS and then participate in the selection rounds for a seat in the institute. Below are the steps to get admission to IMAS Business School:
Step 1: IMAS Business School Application Process 2025
The mode of application is online. Candidates have to fill out the form and pay an application fee to register for a course. The application fee for PGDM and MBA Global courses isINR 500.
Step 2: Selection

IMAS selects candidates for the MBA based on entrance exam scores. The institute considers  CAT, XAT, CMAT, ATMA, MAT, GMAT, and JEEMAT for MBA Global and PGDM. The selection for all other courses is based on the merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam.
Step 3:Admission Confirmation
The admission cell of IMAS informs the selected candidates by email. Such aspirants then need to come for document verification and pay theIMAS feeto confirm their seats in the institute.
